# Codazz - Software Development Company

> Codazz is a leading software development company headquartered in Edmonton, Alberta, Canada with development centers in Chandigarh, India. We specialize in mobile app development, AI/ML solutions, web development, blockchain, cloud/DevOps, SaaS platforms, and digital marketing. Founded by Raman Makkar, we have delivered 500+ projects for clients across 48 cities in 24 countries.

## Company Overview
- Name: Codazz
- Founded: 2018
- CEO: Raman Makkar
- Headquarters: Edmonton, Alberta, Canada
- Development Center: Chandigarh, India
- Team Size: 100+ engineers
- Projects Delivered: 500+
- Client Satisfaction: 99%
- Industries Served: 16+
- Countries Served: 24
- Cities Served: 48

## Services
- Mobile App Development (iOS, Android, Flutter, React Native, Cross-Platform)
- AI & Machine Learning Development (LLMs, Computer Vision, NLP, Predictive Analytics)
- Web Development (Next.js, React, Node.js, Python, SaaS Platforms)
- Blockchain & Web3 Development (Smart Contracts, DeFi, NFT, dApps)
- Cloud & DevOps Services (AWS, GCP, Azure, Kubernetes, CI/CD)
- SaaS Platform Development (Multi-tenant, Billing, Auth, Analytics)
- UI/UX Product Design (Strategy, Wireframing, Design Systems, Prototyping)
- Digital Marketing & SEO (SEO, PPC, Social Media, Content Marketing)

## Ready-Made App Solutions
We offer customizable app solutions based on proven business models:
- Uber Clone (Ride-Hailing) - Starting $45,000
- Airbnb Clone (Rental Marketplace) - Starting $50,000

## Industries We Serve
FinTech, Healthcare, E-Commerce, Logistics, EdTech, Enterprise Software, Food & Restaurant Delivery, Dating & Social Media, Travel & Hospitality, Real Estate & PropTech, Fitness & Wellness, On-Demand Services, Fantasy Sports & Betting, Streaming & Entertainment, Grocery & Retail, Telemedicine & Digital Health

## Technology Expertise
- Frontend: React, Next.js, Vue.js, Angular, TypeScript
- Backend: Node.js, Python, Go, Java, Django, FastAPI
- Mobile: React Native, Flutter, Swift, Kotlin
- AI/ML: OpenAI GPT-4, Claude, LLaMA, TensorFlow, PyTorch, LangChain
- Blockchain: Solidity, Rust, Ethereum, Polygon, Solana, Hyperledger
- Database: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch
- Cloud: AWS (Advanced Partner), Google Cloud, Microsoft Azure
- DevOps: Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, GitHub Actions, Jenkins
